entry.title: SF LMS Event Based Integration
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone have any experience implementing event-based integrations with SuccessFactors Learning, using SAP SF Intelligent Services?

The goal is to replicate learning completion data to downstream systems in a timely manner (as close to real-time as possible). 

I'm looking for any insight on IS or any use cases that have allowed customers to retrieve completion data from LMS and publish it to downstream systems on a consistent basis for real-time compliance requirements.

Thank you!

Melanie

entry.title: Re: ABAP Program shows a Screen which calls a Function which call another screen
entry.content: First please debug. Also, what means 0100 is not shown? What is shown? Where do you go after CALL FUNCTION 'XXX'? Make sure a next screen is defined in the attributes of the dynpro 0100, and that you don't execute LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 or SET SCREEN 0 during the PAI of screen 0100. There are lots of other reasons why a screen is not displayed (LEAVE PROGRAM, etc.)

entry.title: Re: Digital Manufacturing - User Onboarding
entry.content:
Hi,

How do you assign the users to the work centres before they log on? They have been set up in IAS. When they log on the pc will be locked to the POD URL.

Thanks

David

entry.title: Re: Not able to install HTML 5
entry.content: I don't see there is any need to install those

entry.title: 4 updates for you from Mr. Bluebeard about Sapphire, Community and a Learning podcast.
entry.content:
My ride's coming, so I got to go. Hey, everybody. Mr. Bluebeard, Josh Bentley, and I know I need to touch out the blue a little bit, but I'll get that done this weekend, and the reason is I've got four updates in this video. 

The first today is I'm going to be doing my Bluebeard much bluer this weekend as I head down to Sapphire Orlando, so I'll be there next Monday through Wednesday. If you can't be on site in Orlando, then you can be online watching different sessions. I will be doing a Wednesday session on the power of the SAP community. I'm going to be joined by Anita Riegel and Danielle Larocca. Danielle is one of our SAP mentors, and she's going to share about her experience and all the great things that she does as a member of ASUG, as well as as a mentor, and how she uses the SAP community. So watch that remotely, or if you're on site, please join us. and then going to be meeting with lots of mentors and champions on site and having a great time doing that and just those side conversations that are really powerful when you get to meet with other people.

Second update is that I'm kind of selfish, right? And the reason I'm selfish is I'm not just going to Sapphire to learn about all the great content we talk about. It's to see how you communicate with us about it in the SAP community. So if you're watching my video here on LinkedIn or if you're on the SAP community, tag me, ask questions after Sapphire. You can also tag other blog posts that I'm not in with my name, if it's on the SAP community or on LinkedIn or wherever you are, YouTube, and just say, hey, I have a question about whatever technology was talked about at Sapphire. So I'll do my best to get an answer for you or to connect you with the right person. That's why I want to express that I'm selfish because I want you in the community to share with others. And do that where you are. And if you can, bring us into the conversation to help facilitate where needed.

Third update is that Ann Petteroe published a great blog post describing some changes that were recently made to the navigation menu of how we're organizing our coffee corner section and just some of the areas where people are posting with their interest. So read Anne's blog post that I'll put in the description of this video and just see what we're doing to try to help the navigation of the SAP community site be a little better. Always looking for your feedback, and I know that you guys are more than willing to give us that to make your community as good as it can be.

And then the fourth update is that there's a link in here as well to the podcast from the SAP News team. The News Education team does a regular podcast in German and another one in English. And I was on their English -speaking podcast. Almost hour-long conversation, getting to know each other and talk about SAP learning and the community and everything that we work on together. And then finally, I need to get done with this video so I can get picked up from my ride. As you can see here, I'm standing in front of the helipad and my ride's coming. so i gotta go that's how i should be getting to orlando right from a look no anyway i look forward to seeing you guys there next week talk to you later from the sapphire show floor bye

 

Sapphire upate:

https://www.sap.com/events/sapphire/virtual.html?campaigncode=crm-yd25-crs-3141407&source=ppc-glo-googleads-pmax-22504838353--events_x-x-x-x&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=22494796053&gbraid=0AAAAAoTWXrBDPwih6eBuuibBTO1BLlaEe&gclid=CjwKCAjwuIbBBhBvEiwAsNypvaw2YDHcpx02ggBqDcW058EfquTx3YGyluPYFORvtTxl-H7_EWM3ORoCBj4QAvD_BwE&gclsrc=aw.ds

Tag me here with comments or on our YouTube Channels:

SAP Community - https://www.youtube.com/SAPCommunities

SAP Developers - https://www.youtube.com/@sapdevs

Anne’s post about site navigation updates that aren’t just welcoming:

https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/new-blog-post-board-in-the-community-coffee-corner-group/ba-p/14097427

SAP Learning News Podcast:

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/thomasjenewein_sapcommunity-community-activity-7327584765874745344-Gcji?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAADZyOIBBnJ1Ez8yjotmlgYEabufoq3f7EI

Introduction and Update to SAP Community with Josh Bentley

🎧SAPPodcasts https://lnkd.in/ePZdSDma

🎧Apple https://lnkd.in/eUXGmeEq

🎧Spotify https://lnkd.in/dZQ75tU

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!
entry.content: @PierreCol love the pics. Action packed!

entry.title: Role owner stage auto approval in IAG (Access request service)
entry.content:
This blog is intended to explain "Role owner stage auto approval" functionality in IAG (Access request service) and the configuration required to enable it.

Section 1

What is role owner stage auto approval?

Role owner stage auto approval is a new feature released in 2503 release. This functionality allows for automatic approval of access request line items during the role owner stage.

Conditions / attributes of access on which auto approval rules can be based:

  1. Role name
  2. Role criticality/Business role criticality (Low, medium, high and critical)
  3. Role approver
  4. Role business process
  5. Role sub process
  6. Role risk count

Please follow the below documentation to configure the data objects and its associated attributes required for enabling this functionality.

Role Owner Stage Auto Approval

Section 2

Defining a sample decision table for role owner stage auto approval

  • Defining conditions and result

  • Defining the values

Section 3

How the decision table logic works?

If an access request is submitted for any Business or Technical role with a 'low' criticality, it will be automatically approved during the role owner stage.

Note: Business rule takes precedence over the assignment approvers: if any given access has designated assignment approvers and it also matches the condition(s) in the business rule for auto approval, such access will be auto approved.

Section 4

Example scenario:

  • For the sake of simplicity, the access request is set to follow the role owner path during the workflow approval process

  • An access request is raised for the role with low criticality

  • Access request audit log shows the request submission and approval details

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start Demo

Hi Dhanasupriya, 

Thanks for this post, really helpful.

I implemented the same in my Mobile Start app, but I get the message as "can not open an external app" when I try to launch the Myntra app from Mobile Start. I even tried different shopping apps and website links, but no luck.

Not sure if there is any ongoing issue now in Mobile Start. Please let me know if you can help

entry.content:
Hi Noni,

Please refer to the help portal: Credit Checks in Service Orders.

entry.title: Re: SAP MaxAttention IWS 'Journey to Clean Core with SAP MaxAttention and RISE with SAP' (July 16, 2
entry.content:
@severinsen 

The recording can be found via the link below.

Part 1: Digital Library - Asset Preview Page

Part 2: Digital Library - Asset Preview Page

entry.title: Re: Digital Manufacturing - User Onboarding
entry.content:
Hi David, As a user authorized for Manage User Assignment, you can onboard users to a plant via the Manage User Assignment app. Users can be created in the app regardless of their authorization to access DM. You must use their email as the ID so once the logon with their email as ID the user can match to the one created in DM.

Once created, you can assign Workcenters, and upon logging in, the user will gain plant access and the authorization to execute tasks in the assigned Workcenters.

Let me know if you’d like any further refinements!

entry.title: Re: Choosing the Right Analytical Tool: A Comprehensive Guide for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Thanks for this overview! I don't understand the strategy by SAP though. Why would you - knowing you already have a flagship stand-alone analytics solution: SAC - offer five (!!!) different ways to present/analyse data in S4? This feels very over-engineered and way too complex. It reminds of the years after SAP bought BusinessObjects, where we had similar decisions matrices to determine which tool to use for each scenario. Luckily that eventually all converged into a single solution (SAP Analytics Cloud), but apparently on the S4 side the strategy is the exact opposite...

entry.title: How to add macro on Refresh in SAC excel Add-in
entry.content:
Hi 

How to add macro to run while Refresh button in SAC excel Add-in. 

Present SAC Excel file contains many key figures are using to get output KPI's and formatting the file. Now I am hiding  all unwanted key figures with macro using button and keeping only required fields.

But some times users are forgetting to use macro button after Refresh.

We have option SAP BW BEX to run macro on refresh button like below screen shot.

 

Do we have same kind of option like above in SAC Excel add-in Refresh to include macro to run Macro on Refresh.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Connecting FTE and Pay Component fields
entry.content:
Hello All,

I wished to know if SAP offers something standard to connect FTE and Pay Components. What we are looking for, is that whenever someone changes an employee's FTE, the respective Pay Component must get updated as well. This is to ensure that an employee gets his/her salary based on his/her FTE.

Please let me know.

Thank You.

entry.title: Re: Purging data in SAP BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Roland.

Thank you for the update.

As per the link i understood that the partition which is deleted will not shown once clean up action is executed, so had a confusion on it.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BW4HANA/107a6e8a38b74ede94c833ca3b7b6f51/b912a621e66c4da3a0a577da178bad47.html 

But post your clarification , I assume that the static partition remains as such with deleted status for that specific partition.

Correct me if am wrong.

Thanks,

Shyamala.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Program shows a Screen which calls a Function which call another screen
entry.content:
About your question: "what means 0100 is not shown?"

After LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 the screen 0101 is shown again. Instead of 0100.

entry.title: Re: Handling ONB2.0 rehires in SailPoint
entry.content: Good question. We have an additional business rule (Scenario: Rules for Hire/Rehire Processes) that sets the IAM flag to 'No' once the rehire is identified in ONB. The flag is set to 'No' until the other rule I mentioned sets it back to 'Yes' after MPH is finished. The rule looks something like this -> IF Job Information.Event Reason = 'Rehire - ONB' OR 'Rehire - Manual' THEN SET Employment Details.CustomField10 = 'No'

entry.title: Re: Configurable Bill of Materials
entry.content:
Hi Steve,

We found this old post when we were looking for variables in quotes. Did you build the solution in this post? is it in the SAP store?

entry.title: Flexible Shift defination to accommodate overtime production in the OEE calculation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently facing a challenge related to shift timing and OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) calculation in SAP Digital Manufacturing (SAP DM) at our plant.

At present, we have only a single shift definition configured in the system. However, in practice, we occasionally extend production by 1-2 hours outside the defined shift hours—either before the shift start time or after the shift end time—depending on operational demands.

Our objective is to ensure that this overtime or extended production period is also captured and included in the OEE calculation, as it reflects actual productive time and impacts our efficiency metrics.

 

We would like to understand:

  • Is there a standard functionality or configuration option in SAP DM to accommodate overtime production in the OEE calculation?
  • Can we define flexible shift timings, or is there a recommended workaround (e.g., dynamic shift definitions, multiple shifts, custom logic) to achieve this?
  • What would be the best practice to include shift-overproductive time in OEE without disrupting existing reporting and data integrity?

We would appreciate your guidance or any relevant documentation on how to implement this in our current SAP DM setup.

Thank you for your support.

Best Regards,

Utkarsh

entry.title: Custom field with multiline in S4 public cloud-key user extensibility
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a custom field with length as 500 characters in S4 public cloud using key user extensibility. However when I enabled the field in SAP Gui screen, I am getting a single line text input field. I need this to be multiline textbox as 500 characters are long. 

Can some one advise how to create multi line custom text field using key user extensibility in S4 Cloud or S4 public cloud. 

 

Thanks

entry.title: SF TimeOff: Change Employee Flexible Date for Time Account Creation
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we use employee flexible date for time account creation.

Basically, the hire date is the start date of the time account validity, but if the employee goes on parental leave, then the first day after parental leave should be the new validity start date of the following time account. To achieve that, we use a custom field where the flexible date is entered (and changed).

e.g.:

Step 1: Hire Date: 01.05.2024 with custom field filled with date 01.05.2024 - create annual leave account from 01.05.2024 to 30.04.2025

Step 2: add Parental Leave: 01.08.2024 to 31.07.2025 

Step 3: Change the custom field to 01.08.2025 - create next annual leave account from 01.08.2025 to 31.07.2026

Unfortunately, the change of the custom field does not lead to a new validity period for the following time account. It seems that once an account with validity exists, the following account is always created seamless to that one, independent from the employee flexible date. 

Also, it is not possible to change the validity in manage data due to an error massage.

So, we don’t know how to configure this requirement.

Is there a possibility to change the validity period by changing the employee flexible date or can it be changed manually or maybe by file - upload?

 

Thank you and best regards,

Mirko

entry.title: Re: Purging data in SAP BW4HANA
entry.content:
Let's say I have an ADSO with 3 static partitions. 2 of them is in COLD:

I mark partition 0001 to be deleted:

but the data remains (see "Cold Rows").

As stated in the document Deleting Data:

"You can then delete this data physically in SAP BW∕4HANA in the Data Tiering Maintenance app (choose Clean Up) or by using the process chain type Cleanup Archive. "

After this the data is deleted and the partition remains in "Deleted" status. See "Cold Rows":

As stated in the above document:

"To deactivate this lock, you can simply change the temperature to Warm or Hot."

entry.title: User management (SU01) / Work Center / Function field length
entry.content:
In transaction SU01, under the 'Address' tab and the 'Work Center' sub-tab, we can find the 'Function' field. This field has a character limit of 40. This is insufficient for our purposes.

How do you handle this? Do you give every employee only a short job function? Or do you use another field?

entry.title: Re: Define Account Determination for Bank Clearing Accoun...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question to the SAP Community blog.

 

Payment method “T” is often used for automated electronic payments (such as SEPA transfers using the pain.001 format).
In this case, the bank subaccount determination is handled automatically by the payment program, based on the following parameters:

  • The house bank
  • The bank account
  • The transaction type
  • And the payment method configuration

That’s why the “Bank Subaccount” field is intentionally greyed out:
the system prevents manual input because the G/L account is determined dynamically during payment processing.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: SAP Fiori - Remove Multivalue input
entry.content:
Hello. Im trying very hard to make a list report page for a demo. I have a CAP Project, a service.cds file, and a Fiori App.

What I want to do is to remove the right button in this filter, I do not want to let users to insert multiple values and conditions, just one thing:

I have this code in my Fiori App:
annotations.cds:

using CENCERROService as service from '../../srv/service';

/* COLUMNS */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with @(
    UI.LineItem : [
        { $Type : 'UI.DataField', Label : 'Id', Value : Id },
        { $Type : 'UI.DataField', Label : 'Descripcion', Value : Descripcion },
        { $Type : 'UI.DataField', Label : 'Labor', Value : Labor },
        { $Type : 'UI.DataField', Value : Estado, Label : 'Estado' }
    ]
);

/* FILTERS */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with @(
    UI.SelectionFields : [ CampoId, Descripcion,  EstadoId ]
);

/* FILTER: CAMPO */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with {
    CampoId @(
        Common.ValueList : {
            $Type : 'Common.ValueListType',
            CollectionPath : 'CAMPO',
            Parameters : [ { $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut', LocalDataProperty : CampoId, ValueListProperty : 'Id', }, ],
            Label : 'Campo',
        },
        Common.ValueListWithFixedValues : true,
        Common.Label : 'Campo'
    )
};
annotate service.CAMPO with {
    Id @Common.Text : { $value : Descripcion, ![@UI.TextArrangement] : #TextFirst, }
};

/* FILTER: ESTADO */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with {
    EstadoId @(
        Common.ValueList : {
            $Type : 'Common.ValueListType',
            CollectionPath : 'ESTADO',
            Parameters : [ { $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut', LocalDataProperty : EstadoId, ValueListProperty : 'Id', }, ],
            Label : 'Estado',
        },
        Common.ValueListWithFixedValues : true,
        Common.Label : 'Estado'
    )
};
annotate service.ESTADO with { Id @Common.Text : { $value : Descripcion, ![@UI.TextArrangement] : #TextFirst, } };

/* FILTER: DELETE SEARCH INPUT */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with @Capabilities : { 
    SearchRestrictions : {
        $Type : 'Capabilities.SearchRestrictionsType',
        Searchable: false
    },
    FilterRestrictions : {
        $Type : 'Capabilities.FilterRestrictionsType',
        FilterExpressionRestrictions : [
            { Property: 'CampoId', AllowedExpressions: 'SingleValue' }
        ],
        RequiredProperties: [ CampoId ],
        NonFilterableProperties : [ Campo, Estado, HasPlanificadas, HasReales, Id, Labor, LaborId ]
    },
};

And that code generates this:


I have tried to do this:

FilterExpressionRestrictions : [ { Property: 'Descripcion', AllowedExpressions: 'SingleValue' } ],
But did not work.
 
Any help in here?

entry.title: SECM_CONFIGURATION ends with ICM_HTTP_CONNECTION_BROKEN
entry.content:
Hi community,

while configuring ETD connections from S/4-system DM4 to ETD logcollector (running in kubernetes) when testing with "ping streaming" it ends with the message "HTTP Connectivity error: Connection to server broken (ICM_HTTP_CONNECTION_BROKEN).

On OS-level of application server DNS resolution works, as well as curl -vvk <hostname>:9095/1/version

entry.title: Re: Trying to find a field from B1 Journal Entry in a tab...
entry.content: Hello! Thanks so much for your answer. Do you know if there's a page, or dictionary or somewhere (either in HANA or here in the web) where I can find the meaning of each TransType?

entry.title: Re: Choosing the Right Analytical Tool: A Comprehensive Guide for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @xjhacking,

if  i may answer to your above query :

The main purpose of s4 embedded analytics is to focus on large volume of operational data with detail drilldown details. whereas SAC focusses on executive level dashboard.(Main focus is summary and highlighting Trends) 

Thanks with regards

Giri

SAP Product Expert

entry.title: Upload account statement MT940 incorrect
entry.content:
I got a account statement from the service provider PayJoe. The format is MT940. I upload the account statement in the app: Manage Bank Statements. In the app I click on upload, select the format MT940 and click process. Then the protocol shows me an error. 

Termntn during import: Statement no. missing (rec. type :28:): Acct XXXXX XXXXXXX

When I look in the Account statement I identify the rec. type :28C: . But it is mentioned more than one time. It is mentioned seven times. But is always like this:

:28C: 0

I found out that :28C: describes the part of the account statement. The structure of account statement is:


:20:STARTUMSE
:25:
:28C:
:60F:,
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:62F:
-
:20:STARTUMSE
:25:
:28C:
:60F:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:62F:
-
:20:STARTUMSE
:25:
:28C:
:60F:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:62M:
-
:20:STARTUMSE
:25:
:28C:
:60M:
:61:
:86:
:62F:
-
:20:STARTUMSE
:25:
:28C:
:60F:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:62F:
-
:20:STARTUMSE
:25:
:28C:
:60F:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:62F:
-
:20:STARTUMSE
:25:
:28C:
:60F:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:61:
:86:
:62F:
-

Can someone please help with explaining me how I can use the app Map format Data to create a new template for this MT940 format?

Kind Regards

entry.title: Migration Template "Warehouse Stock (new)" - Document Header Text - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In our current SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud project, we are using the migration template “Warehouse stock (new)”. Is there a way to take the document header text into account during the migration? There is no corresponding field in the template.

Many thanks in advance for any feedback.

Best regards
Talke

entry.title: Re: Changing field from NUMC6 to dec 2
entry.content: Ok Thanks Sandra

entry.title: User deactivate via IPS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We provision users from Azure -> IAS -> Enable Now using IPS.

If a user for example:  test1) is removed/deleted from the group in Azure/ IAS, and an IPS Job runs afterward, the user (test1) is not deleted in Enable Now; only their roles are removed. However, the user remains "Active" in Enable Now.

Can the user in Enable Now be deactivated (i.e., the "Active" checkbox removed) through the IPS Job if the user is deleted/removed from the Azure/IAS group?

 Many Thanks for your help !

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Best approach to define corporate colors in crystal r...
entry.content: I suspect that a CRChart color macro was used like @MCOLOR. I didn't realize the colors persist w/ the report even after removing the macro. So, I think that would explain what I'm seeing. But I can't imagine why it would've been intentionally removed.

entry.title: Re: Define Account Determination for Bank Clearing Accoun...

Then I don't understand why do we get this error message when we try to create a bank transfer in the app 'Make Bank Transfer'.

Could you please give me more information on this?

entry.title: Re: posting period - M7053
entry.content:
Hi Raymond,

thank you for the answer!

I did initially close the periods one by one from 2024/08 to 2025/05. 

However it did not change the error message i get from the system.

entry.title: Troubles with IDOC and write modus append for SFTP server
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have next problem. Delivering files (IDOCs) through PO from SAP system and trying to append them into 1 file. Problem comes when client is connecting server too early and pick file when it is not yet fully completed.

Is there any solutions how to make it more safe? Maybe some one had same situation?

Br,

Andrejs

entry.title: What is the work flow table for tasks with status of started and in process?
entry.content:
Hi Work Flow Guru,

Is there a table or report showing tasks which have been in process but not completed?

If user enters and exits a task without completing it, the status gets "in process", which results in the missing work flow in other users in the same task responsible (HR's organization).

The report SWI1_RULE is OK but has no direct link with the task object, say, QM notification's task.

Please cast more light on this.

Sally

entry.title: Re: Quering document lines in user define values
entry.content:
Hi Matija, thanks for answering so quickly!

This syntax gives me internal error 3006 when trying to use this query for the user defined values in a lateral field.

entry.title: SAP Learning Hub Enablement Sessions - New webinars starting 29 May 2025
entry.content:
Whether you're just starting your SAP learning journey or looking to level up your team's enablement strategy, we've got something powerful in store for you.

Starting Thursday, 29 May 2025, we're launching a webinar series designed to help you master the SAP Learning Hub, navigate the SAP Learning Analytics Dashboard, and optimize your post-sales learning support.

From understanding Universal ID and S/P-user management to tracking certification progress and extracting actionable insights — this series will guide you every step of the way.

👉Check out the schedule (updates to follow monthly) and save your spot. Your SAP learning journey just got a whole lot easier.

DateSession TopicKey FocusTimeRegistration Link
29 MaySAP Learning Analytics Dashboard – OverviewDashboard layout, Data Sources, how it supports team learning visibility12:00 - 13:00 CETRegister
5 JuneUnderstanding SAP Universal ID & Managing S-User IDsHelp users understand and manage their SAP Universal ID, Clarify S-User vs P-User, and how to link to UID12:00 - 12:30 CETRegister
12 JuneGetting Started with learning.sap.comActivate licenses, navigate learning.sap.com, earn digital badges, and access extended library12:00 - 13:00 CETRegister
Jun 19SAP Certifications: Paths & PreparationOverview of Certificates, how to prepare for certification exam and study tips, registration process, and rescheduling policies12:00 - 12:30 CETRegister
26 JuneLearning Journeys: What, Why, and HowGuided paths by role (developer, consultant, etc.)12:00 - 12:30 CETRegister

entry.title: Re: Define Account Determination for Bank Clearing Accoun...
entry.content:
Hello again Gabor,

It seems like it's another question then and not specially linked to the main one.

However, I found a note on this. 

Please check the link below and see if it solves your issue :

2214744 - Error FIBL_RPCODE065

Hope this will help.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Purging data in SAP BW4HANA
entry.content: Thanks for your knowledge sharing ..

entry.title: Re: Replacement Process in Advanced Returns Management for SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to introduce EDI in this process. Thus, upon NB2 Return PO requesting Replacement Material Requested, my supplier will sent ASN through EDI.

I would like to integrate this ASN with DESADV. How to trigger Inbound Delivery against Replacement PO ? I saw that confirmation key 0004 is hard coded in Replacement PO. Is that true ? Can we modify it ?

Looking forward to your advise.

Thank you

Regards

Flo

entry.title: Checking the JSON file log
entry.content:
Hello Expert！

This is a simple question.

Is there an App that allows me to view JSON file logs from the S/4 launchpad screen?

Soma

entry.title: Process Manager Simulation
entry.content:
I've created a simple process flow to investigate an issue.

Volume coming in

One task (Warehouse Picking)

Volume coming out

Due to the volume coming in, the number of resources available and the cycle time of the task (this is set to 100% constant), the process should complete successfully and all picks completed.

What i'm finding is that the task still has a number of items still to be picked at the end of the simulation? I don't understand why?

This is to baseline a broader process moving forward, and in reality i know the operation can actually get through the work. So why is the simulation not showing that? Are wait times being factored in for some reason? And if so, can these be removed somewhere?

Help appreciated......

entry.title: ¿Eres estudiante de carrera afín a la tecnología y te interesa el mundo SAP? ¡Esto es para ti!
entry.content:
¡Oportunidad única para estudiantes de tecnología – Evento organizado por ASUGMEX!

¿Estás en el último semestre de tu carrera o recién egresado/a de una disciplina relacionada con la tecnología? ¿Te interesa conocer más sobre el mundo SAP? ¡Entonces esta sesión es para ti!

Fecha: 29 de mayo
Hora: 13:30 – 14:30 (horario de México)

Sobre la sesión: 

La tecnología mueve al mundo, y SAP está al frente de esta transformación. Si estás en el último semestre de tu carrera o recién egresado/a de una disciplina afín a la tecnología, queremos invitarte a esta sesión especial donde descubrirás cómo SAP lidera la innovación y cómo ASUGMEX puede ayudarte a formar parte de este ecosistema.

En esta sesión te explicaremos en detalle nuestra membresía estudiantil gratuita, una oportunidad única para acceder a sesiones virtuales sobre funcionalidad, procesos, casos de uso, innovación, integraciones, tecnología y mucho más. También conocerás los diferentes caminos para capacitarte y definir un plan de carrera en el mundo de SAP.

Al formar parte de esta membresía, tendrás acceso a una Asociación que reúne a empresas usuarias de SAP, implementadores, consultores y expertos, lo que te permitirá conectar con líderes de la industria y ampliar tus oportunidades.

Acompáñanos en esta sesión especial para descubrir cómo potenciar tu futuro en SAP.

Temario

1. ¿Qué es ASUG México?
2. Qué incluye y cómo puedes ser parte de la membresía estudiantil
3. Q&A

Oradores(as):

Malena Gutiérrez
Directora General de ASUG México

Más información: ¿Eres estudiante de carrera afín a la tecnología y te interesa el mundo SAP? ¡Esto es para ti! – ASUGMEX

entry.title: Visibility of texts in output management
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

i am creating a sales quotation and entering internal and external texts in the header, for example, Internal Note (TX01) and Sales Note for Customer (TX02). Both texts are being printed in the output preview of the document.
I assumed that internal texts (TX01) would not be printed on the document.

Where can I configure the visibility of texts in document printing within output management?

Thanks in adavance!

Katharina

entry.title: Variant configuration (LO-VC). Charcateristic restriction based on a MultiValue charctaristic values
entry.content:
Hello SAP gurus 🙂

I have a question about variant configuration in SAP LO-VC. Is it possible to restrict a characteristic to only the values that have been entered in a multivalue characteristic within the same configuration?

Example:

  • Color (multivalue): "Red", "Blue", "Black"
  • FurnitureColor (single value): I should only be able to choose one value from these three since they are the selected values for the "Color" characteristic.

I would like to know how to implement this in SAP LO-VC in this dynamic way. Does anyone have experience with this type of configuration and could share an example or guide on how to achieve it?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Establish websocket connection to On-Premise-System from BAS
entry.content: Gregor, Do you know if theres any documentation on what set-up is required to enable BAS to On-premise communication (destination properties, SCC settings)? If I deploy from BAS to ABAP, websockets connect without issue but I'm having trouble with the BAS -> BTP destination -> SCC -> on-premise connection.

entry.title: Re: Troubles with IDOC and write modus append for SFTP server
entry.content: Good opportunity to make use of the temporary file option.

entry.title: Re: Recipe-Phase cross order relationship (between 2 separate Recipe') - PPDS impact
entry.content: I tried it as well, but I don't get a cross order rel.

entry.title: Validação Elemento PEP x IT0027
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal!

Estamos utilizando o Elemento PEP no IT0027 para a alocação de custos de pessoal, mas implementamos uma validação adicional para garantir que o Elemento informado seja verificado no ECC (como a validade e a empresa a que pertence, por exemplo).

Alguém já passou por essa situação ou teria alguma sugestão de como podemos fazer essa validação de forma eficiente?

Agradeço desde já pela ajuda!

entry.title: Re: BW: Delete content from Write Optimized DSO in Chain
entry.content:
According the error message there looks to be some sort of SQL error. Check the joblog, syslog (sm21) and the corresponding work process trace file from SM50 to see if there are any errors.

If you find nothing, then check in the debugger from where the error/sql exception is coming from.

entry.title: Re: Add Field to FBl1N/ in Fiori App
entry.content: Hi, This enabled field in FBL1n but not available in Fiori app 'Manage Supplier Line Items' App. No BADIs are available too. Please suggest how we can add a field from BSEG to fiori app.

entry.title: Validation Rule - Compare Opening balances to Prior year balances
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Is there a way to write validation rules to compare prior year (BS balances) to the BS opening balance (subtype)?
The period mode selections don’t have a prior year YTD option.
We are using 2023 OP FPS01.
I see that the 2502 Cloud version has the updated validation approach where the option to select Closing balance for the previous year is available. ->
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/ef6cd7b35ce94fbf89d4c979d5bf5676.html?q=validation+rule+groups

What can be done with 2023OP?
One option is to copy the prior year ending balance to current year version B and then compare actual to version B but version is not a characteristic available for selection.
Any ideas?

Regards,
Eyal

entry.title: SAP Fiori - Remove Adapt Filter Button
entry.content:
Hello. Im trying to create a list report page, and  I want to remove a "Adapt Filters" button.

This is what my page looks like

I did restrict what fields are available to filter, so in my "Adapt Filters" only appears this ones


But still, I do not want the adapt filter to be shown.

This is my annotations.cds file content:

using CENCERROService as service from '../../srv/service';

/* COLUMNS */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with @(
    UI.LineItem : [
        { $Type : 'UI.DataField', Label : 'Id', Value : Id },
        { $Type : 'UI.DataField', Label : 'Descripcion', Value : Descripcion },
        { $Type : 'UI.DataField', Label : 'Labor', Value : Labor },
        { $Type : 'UI.DataField', Value : Estado, Label : 'Estado' }
    ]
);

/* FILTERS */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with @(
    UI.SelectionFields : [ CampoId, Descripcion,  EstadoId ]
);

/* FILTER: CAMPO */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with {
    CampoId @(
        Common.ValueList : {
            $Type : 'Common.ValueListType',
            CollectionPath : 'CAMPO',
            Parameters : [ { $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut', LocalDataProperty : CampoId, ValueListProperty : 'Id', }, ],
            Label : 'Campo',
        },
        Common.ValueListWithFixedValues : true,
        Common.Label : 'Campo'
    )
};
annotate service.CAMPO with {
    Id @Common.Text : { $value : Descripcion, ![@UI.TextArrangement] : #TextFirst, }
};

/* FILTER: ESTADO */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with {
    EstadoId @(
        Common.ValueList : {
            $Type : 'Common.ValueListType',
            CollectionPath : 'ESTADO',
            Parameters : [ { $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut', LocalDataProperty : EstadoId, ValueListProperty : 'Id', }, ],
            Label : 'Estado',
        },
        Common.ValueListWithFixedValues : true,
        Common.Label : 'Estado'
    )
};
annotate service.ESTADO with {
    Id @Common.Text : { $value : Descripcion, ![@UI.TextArrangement] : #TextFirst, }
};

/* FILTER: DELETE SEARCH INPUT */
annotate service.ORDENTRABAJO with @Capabilities : { 
    SearchRestrictions : {
        $Type : 'Capabilities.SearchRestrictionsType',
        Searchable: false
    },
    FilterRestrictions : {
        $Type : 'Capabilities.FilterRestrictionsType',
        FilterExpressionRestrictions : [
            { Property: 'CampoId', AllowedExpressions: 'SingleValue' }
        ],
        RequiredProperties: [ CampoId ],
        NonFilterableProperties : [ Campo, Estado, HasPlanificadas, HasReales, Id, Labor, LaborId ]
    },
    Deletable : false
};

Any help out there?

entry.title: Re: Incoming IDOCS get stuck in status 64
entry.content: Start transaction OYEB (IDOC-Inbound-processing activate) und be sure that SWU3 RFC-Destination is green

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

currently there is no concrete schedule available when 7DM - Advanced Intercompany Sales - Make-to-Order and Variant Config will be available in S/4HANA Private Cloud / OP.
We are aware that many customers are waiting for the enablement of MTO / variant configurable materials.

Currently our full focus is on the implementation of Multistage Intercompany Sales and Multistage Intercompany Stock Transfer with a target release S/4HANA 2025 FPS01.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: How to specify the usnam data of the rbkp table when creating a MIRO invoice.
entry.content:
When I use the BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_PARK BAPI to create a MIRO invoice, I tracked the standard code and found that an asynchronous update process is triggered when inserting data into the rbkp table. The method called by the asynchronous update process is MRM_INVOICE_HEADER_SAVE, within which usnam is directly set to sy-uname. I want to ask how to set it to a user of my choice.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to specify the usnam data of the rbkp table when...
entry.content:
As you have detected in the code, there is a fixed logic that sets SY-UNAME. If there were a way to customize it, there would be places in the same code allowing other values.

From software perspective, there is no reason to include a different user name for the invoice creator.

entry.title: Re: How to trigger workflow for MRP Purchase Requisitions
entry.content:
Dear Malleswari,

Thank you once again for sharing this content — it’s incredibly insightful and much appreciated!

That said, the proposed solution currently caters to release strategies defined at the header level. To ensure that the implementation also works for the item-level release, a few modifications will be necessary:

  • line 6:  key = |{ im_eban-banfn }{ im_eban-bnfpo }|.
  • line 40:  objtype         = 'BUS2009'  

KR

Bartu

entry.title: Understanding Crystal Report Connections
entry.content:
This question is regarding the My Connections listed in the Database Expert.

In other development environments, a connection is only the details required to connect to a particular database server and database. You can then run as many different queries as needed that reference the single connection (data source).

It seems that in Crystal Reports a connection is the combination of the data source details AND a single query (Command). Is that correct?

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP Migration Options, Source ERP on HANA
entry.content: Yes, that's it but only if the original source DB is SAP HANA. SAP Public Cloud only supports HANA databases for ECC.

entry.title: Re: Procurement of Services in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
'Add Contract/Catalog Item' during Service Sheet Creation

If a Supplier does not get the option to 'Add Contract/Catalog Item' while creating a Service Entry Sheet, please check for Default Transaction Rule 'Allow suppliers to access your Ariba procurement applications for collaborative invoicing, requisitioning, managing time and expense sheets, and creating service sheets'.
Also, may need to work with Ariba Team for enabling 'SSP Buyer entitlement' on Buyer Network Admin side. More details in internal Support Note KB0405344.

entry.title: Re: Leveraging Linear Regression in SAP AI: Predicting Business Outcomes with Data Science
entry.content:
Nice blog, in fact many of the apps mentioned utilize regression in various flavors from the Predictive Analysis Library, for details see SQL documentation  or Python HANA ML documentation.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Connect DWC to SAP Source System using SNC RFC
entry.content:
Hi,

Do we need to create PSE using sidadm or root user? I am trying to create but no files are generating in my directory. Any update ?

entry.title: WANT TOLERANCE IN ALTERNATE UNIT OF MEASURE
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

Our product is steel based Tubes and we have base UoM is Kg and but we are selling the products in Kgs as well as Pcs.

we are maintaining the alternate Uom Pc with Kg, But in our steel industry, always conversion factor is not fix with reference to kg due to material thickness characteristics. 

Suppose we have received tubes order from customer in which customer is demanding 1.20mm thickness and but always it is not necessary that production will always be in 1.20mm thickness, it may be vary according to allowable thickness and due to this, conversion factor will not be same. 

our concern is that whenever we make gr against production order into system, system should allow us to change the weight as per actual which will be in defined tolerance limit. currently system is not allowing to change "Qty in SKU", it"s getting auto calculated based on conversion factor maintained in material master.

we are requesting you to suggest us the way, so that our stock can be valued properly.

thanks

entry.title: Are there an specific Quality Gate templates for BTP projects?
PR: copied line with incorrect G/L accoun
entry.content:
When a line item is copied in Manage Purchase Requisition app, the user changes the material in the new line however GL account is not redetermined.   This leads to user has to delete the GL and enter manually which is not the expected behavior.

Any suggestions.

entry.title: Re: physical data model using excel import is failing in...
entry.content:
Hi, I tried it with PDM and it seems like a bug to me. George is right about Reference Joins. You have to import them as separate object (on separate excel sheet), but the import still doesn`t work properly. I am still getting "Error: Could not find parent object location with Name = Order.CustomerID". I tried many things (playing with Reference settings in Model Options, changing the order of excel sheets to import, modifying actual values to import, importing with/without ParentKey property on the Relationship,...) nothing helped. But I agree, that standard Excel Import should be capable of that.

You have several options now:

  • debug and repair the Excel Import extension by yourself (thousands of lines of code, uncertain results)
  • write your own import routine (quite easy if you know what you are doing, I`ve done it many times, I can help you with that)
  • do manual repairs after each import

Which option is best for you depends on number of objects to be imported, whether it is one-time or repeated action, how quickly you need it, etc.

HTH and in case you need my help, let me know here (or on LinkedIn),

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: Re: Testing of Developer Extensibility in S4hana Public C...
entry.content:
Hi,

CDS views created in ADT will not be visible in the “Custom CDS Views” APP. But you can see them in the “View Browser” APP. Objects created in ADT can be released for Key User Extensibility and can be used in some Key User APPs.

Best Regards,
Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Stop Reservations Without Stock Available
entry.content:
I'm sorry - but no - you need to stick with standard biz processes. It's perfectly normal to create reservations for materials which you do not have in stock. Otherwise, how would you know what, when to order? How would the MRP run? You should not stop creating reservations just because you don't have stock. 

Please provide more context because right now this requirement seems like a very bad idea.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to get access to a GTS learning system?
entry.content:
Hi @peter_langner 
Please access our Practice Systems site and fill the search field with "SAP Global Trade Services"
The hi list will show you Hands-on Practice for SAP Global Trade Services

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements vs. Freestyle Apps: When to Use What
entry.content:
Hi - It is always great to see SAP Fiori elements in on top of mind for our community. While the summary is catching the main points for SAP Fiori element V2...

... in SAP Fiori elements V4, there are options for developer efficiency AND flexibility

  • Using floorplans is the way to go for maximum developer efficiency. When only tiny things are missing, then the extensions can be used.
  • The flexible programming model as part of SAP Fiori elements V4 allows you to build your custom pages with building blocks, staying within the framework but having the flexibility to use the building blocks and options within the framework. For more information, see: Flexible Programming Model Explorer

Best regards,
Katrin on behalf of the SAP Fiori elements team

entry.title: How many customers successfully implemented or migrated to latest BOBJ version of BI 2025?
entry.content: Would like to know, how many customers successfully implemented or migrated to latest BOBJ version of BI 2025?

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas MOBGui Labels translation
entry.content: You can translate the flavor texts in the Personas Admin application. Did you try that?

entry.title: Re: Understanding Crystal Report Connections
entry.content: Never mind. I see now that you can create multiple Commands that reference a single Connection.

entry.title: Re: LeanIX Adapter for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: This is a great explanation! Will definitely try it out! Thank you 🙌

entry.title: Re: BOL Event based Rule
entry.content: Hello Satish, Can you please share the screenshot of LTRS Event based trigger config and full code.

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas MOBGui Labels translation
entry.content: Thanks for reply Tamas. No I'm not aware of this translation in Admin Application. Do you have any steps or any reference link that can guide me on this? Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: EKKO Table RLWRT Field
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you confirm the value of PO is not change after approving it. That may be the reason where system capture total value of PO during approval.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Blog It Forward - Juhi Kulshreshtha
entry.content:
My full name is Juhi Kulshreshtha and I prefer being called ‘Juhi’. I’m an SAP BTP Enthusiast and working as SAP BTP Competency Lead. My responsibilities include helping the clients stay ahead of the competition by implementing the latest tools and services provided by SAP BTP. I also have keen interest in applications of AI for business scenarios to enhance end-user experience and bring tangible value for the clients.

It is an honour to be nominated by my friend and SAP Community Advocate @StephanieMarley  for the ‘Blog-It-Forward’ series. Though I have written a number of blogs on various SAP topics and events. This is the second time I’m posting on the SAP Community site. My first blog on SAP Community site was about an SIT Event in Bengaluru in India in the year 2022. 

My SAP Journey

I have donned multiple hats in the past and played roles of SAP Project Manager, Architect as well as SME in various areas of SAP. I started my career as an SAP Developer in the areas of ABAP and Webdynpro for Java in the year 2005. 

I have come a long way since then implementing various end-to-end SAP solutions spanning multiple industries and line-of-businesses. 

My areas of expertise in SAP include solutioning in BTP, S/4 HANA and HANA DB Upgrade and ABAP Remediation. My other implementation experiences include SAP Ariba , SAP Concur and SAP FSCD.

My industry experience comprises  - Banking, Insurance, Retail, and Consumer Goods and Services. And my line-of-business experience comprises Finance, Procurement and Supply Chain. I love exploring the newest technologies with a Human-Centered approach.

 

SAP Community Engagements

Being a member of SAP Community provides the opportunity to connect with other SAP Professionals across the SAP world and get the ability to understand different perspectives. Various SAP Events provide a platform to network and gain valuable insights from the experience of others. These events have something for each of the participants irrespective of their experience or areas of expertise in SAP. 

 My engagement with SAP Community has been highest during the last two years, especially when it comes to personally being there as a speaker or an attendee. The latest event that I attended was SAP Inside Track 2025 in Bengaluru . Here are a few pictures with community members -

 

Also, I was fortunate to get the opportunity to speak at SAP TechED 2023 on the topic ‘Exploring Machine Learning with SAP AI Core: Uncovering the What, Why, and How.’ Here are a few photos from the SAP Teched 2023 session -

This session focussed on how organisations can implement ‘Narrow AI’ use cases for their specific requirements using SAP AI Core in BTP. Now BTP has all the capabilities to implement ‘GenAI’ use cases as well. SAP BTP GenAI Hub and Vector DB form important components of such use cases. Not only this, now Joule Studio helps to implement Agentic AI use cases as well. Future roadmap includes customised AI use cases to provide maximum benefit specific to the business scenarios.

SAP in India

SAP India is a well-known brand in the ERP area. It is also recognised as the fastest growing market for SAP SE. It has been recognised as the Top Employer 2025 for the 7th consecutive year. And it is among the top 3 organisations across all industries in India. 

Being a resident of Bengaluru in India, the general sentiment about SAP India is extremely good. And people have high opinions about working in SAP India.

Language in Technology and Academics in India

There are about 22 official languages in India and many local languages and dialects.

Generally students are taught in English and in one of their local official languages. In India, we have plenty of English speaking talent working in every field. So the language barrier to connect with the rest of the world is non-existent. As SAP Consultants our focus always is to provide the best-in-class services and experiences to the clients. And SAP Consulting firms encourage their employees to learn other international languages like German, Spanish, Japanese etc to work seamlessly.

Global Experience

I have majorly worked with clients located in North America, Canada, UK and Europe. And have travelled to the USA and the UK for work related assignments.

I got the opportunity to connect with people of different nationalities like Americans, Germans, Spanish, English, Czechs and Japanese during my stints in different SAP projects. And I have come to deeply value their principles like openness, transparency, honesty, hard work, discipline and perseverance.These values have not only shaped my character but have also become guiding lights, steering me through challenges and fostering personal growth.

 

Social Media 

I have been using LinkedIn as the medium to connect with other professionals and share or gain knowledge and perspectives. It provides the ability to stay connected with SAP Community members and influencers whom we have met during our professional journey and during various SAP Events. I have met Stephanie through LinkedIn and I’m looking forward to meeting her personally. 

I’m connected with SAP Mentors and SAP Champions on LinkedIn like @esjewett , @Raquel_Pereira_da_Cunha , @mohit_bansal3 , @ChandraBhushanSingh to name a few. I’m also connected with senior executives and senior SAP professionals through LinkedIn. I’m available on BlueSky SAP Community and would like to connect with other SAP Professionals there as well.

Personal Interests

My personal interests include reading, walking and listening to music. I’m an ardent reader and my reading list includes books on the topics of Management, Fiction and Technology. 

I believe in continuous learning and improvement . One of my favourite quotes is - “We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.” by Aristotle.

Walking helps me to stay active and fit. An evening stroll is also an opportunity to meet and chit chat with neighbours and hobnob with their pets. This, I believe, helps a lot in unwinding and de-stressing. I go to the gym two to three times a week. And I always look for a 5 minute break during work to stand up and walk a bit. I like listening to English and Hindi songs during my leisure time. 

I also like to go on vacation to explore a new place every year with my family. Within India, we have many options to choose from, you can opt for vacationing in mountains or beaches. Outside India, we have explored UAE, Malaysia and Vietnam. Here are some of the photos taken during my recent trip to Vietnam showing the famous Hanoi Train Street and Halong Bay.

Trends to watch out for

The ‘Next-Big-Thing’ continues to be AI. The GenAI trend will continue to evolve in different ways. From chatbots to Agentic AI, there are umpteen ways to apply GenAI usage patterns and bring value for the businesses. Unlike in the past when AI/ML used to be the domain of Data Scientists and Data Engineers, GenAI has turned the tables by providing tools which can also be understood and applied for business specific scenarios by the business users and analysts without the knowledge of Data Science or Machine Learning. Though a basic understanding of GenAI Concepts is still very much needed. 

Prompt Engineering and designing of Agentic AI Systems are very much in. In SAP or SAP BTP, GenAI appears in the form of SAP's Copilot called Joule. Joule comes with different flavours - Joule for Developers and Joule for Consultants. While Joule for Developers helps to free up developers time and increase their efficiency as well as helps in building quality code with human-in-the-loop approach. Joule for Consultants is intended to help consultants in SAP implementations and cloud transformations and helps to increase their productivity and speed up the implementations. Custom AI solutions in BTP will continue to have their importance for specific scenarios like recommendations and predictive analytics. Also Embedded AI brings instant value to the Business by just activating the relevant components in your SAP S/4 HANA instances.

Also talking about BDC which is a SAP’s fully managed SAAS solution for unifying and governing all the SAP data with third party data. Now businesses can leverage more contextual data than before to perform AI/ML operations and strategic analytics.This solution provides businesses with enhanced data products and robust data governance. And to top it all, SAP’s AI Ethics policies make sure that SAP delivers AI products and solutions with highest ethical, security, and privacy standards. Also, SAP’s cloud solutions play a key role in enabling a modern IT landscape which provides the flexibility to innovate and evolve faster with the dynamic market conditions.

With this I would like to conclude my blog. I would like to nominate @esjewett  who is a distinguished SAP Mentor and has contributed to the improvement of developers' experiences. I am confident he will share compelling experiences and perspectives that will enrich our discussions.

entry.title: 'Could not determine EWM stock data for: Availability Group 001 error'.
entry.content: I keep getting this error message when trying to perform an inbound delivery. This occurs when trying to check the document distribution. Any help on this would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!

Fond memories of Sapphire, I will be there next week if anyone wants to meet up and grab a coffee.

JohnA

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to get access to a GTS learning system?
entry.content: Thank you very much for your help. I suggest to add somewhere GTS in the title. E.g. SAP Global Trade Services (GTS).

entry.title: Re: Silent Data Migration (SDMI) in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: It should run atleast until all the migrations are completed.

entry.title: Re: Integration Solution Advisory Methodology (ISA-M): Define Integration Guidelines for Your Organi
entry.content:
Hi team 

i would be interested to be part of the JAM too, thanks in advance

Regards

Dorian

entry.title: Re: Error During User Provisioning with IPS to Enable Now
entry.content:
Hello @ThomasRauen 

Thanks a lot for your help.

I have also deleted the users under Server Housekeeping (in Enable Now), but I still receive this error during re-provisioning.

Does this mean that users who were once provisioned to Enable Now and then deleted cannot be provisioned again to Enable Now?

Or, where else are the users archived?

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: External Learning Request - Notification for confirma...
entry.content: The trigger of the "ExternalVerificationReminder" notification is when the "User completes an external learning activity". The template contains the user who's requesting it. It doesn't seem to have a cadence if the verification isn't complete within a certain number of days.

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Juhi Kulshreshtha
entry.content: Juhi, thank you for sharing and #BIF! I have no doubt that your volunteerism has helped people shape their career journey, encourage continuous learning, and having community fun together! We appreciate you!

entry.title: Re: Organize and Access with Ease: Discover SAP SuccessFactors Document Management Tool
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd also like to know if it's possible to edit the 'Pre-defined' categories in the system.

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: SAP Databricks in SAP Business Data Cloud : Unifying SAP Business Data with Lakehouse Intelligen
entry.content: Great blog Mona!

entry.title: Re: How to pass parameter to the function from XML view
entry.content:
@RaminS try the below code
 

<Button ... press="onPressFun(${uiModel>/something}, 'Saved', $event )"/>

moving the $event as the last argument worked for me in version 1.134.1
refer: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/b0fb4de7364f4bcbb053a99aa645affe.html

entry.title: Permit to work in SAP - How can i start it from scratch onwards?
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

Greetings of the day!

I am planning to start newly, Permit to Work. Could you please suggest and provide the links here?

Could you please provide any end-to-end links if you know of any?

Thanks & Regards 

Tam

entry.title: API_SALES_ORDER_SRV pricing details with print flag
entry.content:
In ECC and on prem solutions, we can use RV_PRICE_PRINT_ITEM to assess which pricing conditions to display when accessing a sales order.

With the use of the API however, we just get back the entire list of price components and yet none of the subtotals come back.

We don't want to hard code logic to total up the JR1, JR2, JR3, JR4, JR5 tax conditions when we've already configured the pricing to subtotal these and a print flag of 'B' to show this at the header level, only if the value is not zero.

How can we do this when using the API?

entry.title: Re: Steps to access Azure Blob Storage via REST API from SAP CPI using Azure Storage Adapter and SAP
entry.content:
Hi @dharamverma 

I am getting below error. could you please help me to fix the issue.

com.sap.adapters.factory.azure.exception.AzureException: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><Error><Code>AuthenticationFailed</Code><Message>Server failed to authenticate the request. Make sure the value of Authorization header is formed correctly including the signature.
RequestId:acaa3a87-901e-001d-1af1-c425f5000000
Time:2025-05-14T16:56:14.9738964Z</Message><AuthenticationErrorDetail>Signature did not match. String to sign used was
2025-05-14T10:35:14Z
2025-05-14T18:35:14Z
/blob/tempnyr/$root
policy for cpiblob


2024-11-04
c






</AuthenticationErrorDetail></Error>

entry.title: Re: UI does not refresh on delete of instance through cus...
entry.content: hi @Shahab2, did you solve your issue? im on newest version and im facing the same problem, after deltingh trough custom action system is trying to perform the GET and i have error
